title: Horizon of Khufu: An Immersive Expedition to Ancient Egypt Arrives in Brisbane
description: Industry leaders of cultural entertainment in virtual reality, Excurio, along with global live-entertainment platform, Fever, are launching the Brisbane debut of Horizon of Khufu, a meticulously researched, free-roaming VR experience to the hidden wonders of Ancient Egypt. Launching at Fever Hub Brisbane on Friday 27th March 2026, the experience takes guests back 4,500 years to ... Continued

title: Winter Olympics closing ceremony celebrates athletes, Italian art at ancient Roman amphitheater
description: The Milan Cortina Olympics ended Sunday with a closing ceremony inside the ancient Roman amphitheater, Verona Arena.

title: Rediscovery of ancient Australian 'sea-salamanders' from the beginning of the Age of Dinosaurs
description: Fossils of an ancient marine amphibian that stalked the coasts of Western Australia 252 million years ago have been rediscovered after they went missing from museum collections for 50 years. The fossils were discovered in the 1960s and 1970s, and identified as a species of marine amphibian called Erythrobatrachus noonkanbahensis, a crocodile-like relative of modern salamanders and frogs that grew up to 2m in length and lived at the beginning of the Age of Dinosaurs. The fossils were missing for 50 years until they were found mislabeled in a museum collection in California. Reanalysis of the fossils reveals that they actually belong to two kinds of marine amphibians: Erythrobatrachus and Aphaneramma. The researchers say that Erythrobatrachus had a roughly 40cm head and was likely a broad-headed top-predator, while Aphaneramma was similar in size, with a long, thin snout for catching small fish.

title: 'Magical' Italian Games close with party in ancient Verona Arena
description: (Photo credit: REUTERS/Lisi Niesner)VERONA, Italy -- Italy said a fond farewell to the Winter Olympics on Sunday with an open-air ceremony in the ancient Verona Arena that celebrated art and sporting achievement at a Games lauded as a model for how to stage such events.The Games, formally co-hosted by Milan and Cortina d'Ampezzo, have been spread across a large area of northern Italy and passed off smooth
